modern_context_en: The fifth final step: kalyana. Tirumala celebrates 'Nitya Kalyanotsavam' -- daily welfare-festival. Sarvalokasadasarvakalyana: all worlds, always, complete welfare. God's nature IS perpetual kalyana. Five steps remain -- halfway through the final ten.
nri_context: At the midpoint of the final ten, Sarvalokasadasarvakalyana ensures that every name chanted, every batch completed, every session invested yields comprehensive welfare -- for you and for all worlds.
usage_context: Chant as the fifth of the final ten, during Nitya Kalyanotsavam, and when comprehensive welfare needs its eternality affirmed.

meaning_en: The eternal and limitless grace flowing to every devotee at all times
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण भक्तों पर सदा सम्पूर्ण कृपा, शाश्वत और असीम अनुग्रह
modern_context: छठा अन्तिम कदम -- कृपा। कृपा -- बिना कारण, बिना शर्त, बिना माँगे -- भगवान का सबसे रहस्यमय गुण। सर्वभक्तसदासर्वकृपा -- सब भक्तों पर, सदा, सम्पूर्ण कृपा। इस सहस्रनाम की सम्पूर्ण यात्रा -- नाम 1 से 996 -- भगवान की कृपा से ही सम्भव हुई। चार कदम शेष।
modern_context_en: The sixth final step: kripa. Grace: without reason, without condition, without being asked -- God's most mysterious quality. Sarvabhaktasadasarvakripa: all devotees, always, complete grace. This entire Sahasranama journey -- name 1 to 996 -- was itself possible only through God's grace. Four steps remain.
nri_context: The grace that brought you from name 1 to name 996 -- through batches, sessions, continents, and time zones -- IS Sarvabhaktasadasarvakripa operating. Four names remain. Grace carried you here; grace will carry you to 1000.
usage_context: Chant as the sixth of the final ten, during gratitude for grace, and when the Sahasranama itself is recognised as a grace-gift.

meaning_en: The eternal witness who has observed every moment of every world forever
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण लोकों के सदा सम्पूर्ण साक्षी, शाश्वत सार्वभौमिक द्रष्टा
modern_context: सातवाँ अन्तिम कदम -- साक्षी। भगवान ने इस सहस्रनाम का हर नाम सुना, हर बैच देखा, हर session साक्षी रहे। सर्वलोकसदासर्वसाक्षी -- सब लोकों में, सदा, सब कुछ देखने वाले। 997 नाम -- भगवान ने 997 बार आपकी भक्ति देखी। तीन कदम शेष -- साक्षी अन्तिम तीन कदमों में भी आपके साथ।
modern_context_en: The seventh final step: sakshi -- the witness. God has heard every name of this Sahasranama, witnessed every batch, observed every session. Sarvalokasadasarvasakshi: the eternal witness of everything, everywhere, always. 997 names -- God has witnessed your devotion 997 times. Three steps remain. The witness walks beside you for the final three.
nri_context: Every name chanted alone in an apartment abroad, every batch read on a phone screen, every session completed during quiet hours -- Sarvalokasadasarvasakshi has witnessed them all. Three names to the summit.
usage_context: Chant as the seventh of the final ten, when the divine witness of your entire journey needs acknowledging.

meaning_en: The eternal and complete lover of every devoted soul in all creation
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण भक्तों के सदा सम्पूर्ण प्रेमी, शाश्वत और असीम दिव्य प्रेमकर्ता
modern_context: आठवाँ अन्तिम कदम -- प्रेम। शरणागति, मोक्ष, आनन्द, मंगल, कल्याण, कृपा, साक्षी -- और अब प्रेम। सर्वभक्तसदासर्वप्रेमी -- सब भक्तों से, सदा, सम्पूर्ण प्रेम। यही अन्तिम सत्य -- भगवान आपसे प्रेम करते हैं। 998 नामों की यात्रा का सार एक वाक्य: भगवान आपसे प्रेम करते हैं। दो कदम शेष।
modern_context_en: The eighth final step: prema -- love. Sharanagati, moksha, ananda, mangala, kalyana, kripa, sakshi -- and now prema. Sarvabhaktasadasarvapremi: God loves every devotee, always, completely. THIS is the ultimate truth: God loves you. The essence of 998 names in one sentence: God loves you. Two steps remain.
nri_context: After 998 names across countless sessions -- the single truth that contains them all: Sri Venkatesha loves you. Loves you across oceans, across time zones, across lifetimes. Sarvabhaktasadasarvapremi. Two names to the summit.
usage_context: Chant as the eighth of the final ten, during prema bhakti meditation, and when the Sahasranama's ultimate truth -- divine love -- needs its most complete expression.

meaning_en: The eternal creator of every auspiciousness and goodness in every world
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण लोकों में सदा सम्पूर्ण शुभ बनाने वाले, शाश्वत सार्वभौमिक शुभंकर

śubhaṅkara.en: creator of auspiciousness, maker of good

modern_context: नौवाँ अन्तिम कदम -- शुभ। 999वाँ नाम -- 1000 से एक पहले -- penultimate -- सबसे शुभ स्थान। सर्वलोकसदासर्वशुभंकर -- सब लोकों में, सदा, सम्पूर्ण शुभ बनाने वाले। इस सहस्रनाम की सम्पूर्ण यात्रा शुभ रही -- नाम 1 से 999 -- और अन्तिम शुभता एक कदम दूर। एक कदम शेष -- अन्तिम नाम -- शिखर पर पहुँचने का समय।
modern_context_en: The ninth final step: shubha -- auspiciousness. The 999th name -- one before 1000 -- the penultimate -- the most auspicious position. Sarvalokasadasarvashubhankara: creator of all auspiciousness, in all worlds, always. This entire Sahasranama journey has been shubha -- name 1 through 999 -- and the final shubhata is one step away. ONE step remains. The summit is one name away. The time has come.
nri_context: At name 999 -- one name from completing the entire Venkateswara Sahasranama -- Sarvalokasadasarvashubhankara seals this penultimate moment with ultimate auspiciousness. One step. One name. One summit.
usage_context: Chant as the penultimate name of the entire Sahasranama, when one step separates you from completion, and when 999 names of devotion prepare the heart for the thousandth.

root_word: śrī + veṅkaṭeśa + sahasranāma + paripūrṇa + sat + cit + ānanda + parabrahma
meaning_en: Sri Venkatesha -- the completely fulfilled, existence-consciousness-bliss absolute Brahman -- revealed through a thousand sacred names
meaning_hi: श्री वेंकटेश -- सहस्रनाम से परिपूर्ण (पूर्णतः प्रकटित) सत्-चित्-आनन्द परब्रह्म -- हज़ार नामों से उजागर सर्वोच्च सत्य
modern_context:
ॐ श्रीवेंकटेशसहस्रनामपरिपूर्णसच्चिदानन्दपरब्रह्मणे नमः -- 1000वाँ नाम -- शिखर -- सहस्रनाम पूर्ण।

यह सहस्रनाम का सबसे भव्य, सबसे लम्बा, सबसे समावेशी नाम है -- आठ शब्द एक नाम में:

• श्री -- शुभता
• वेंकटेश -- तिरुमला के भगवान (सगुण)
• सहस्रनाम -- हज़ार नाम (यह यात्रा)
• परिपूर्ण -- पूर्णतः प्रकटित
• सत् -- अस्तित्व
• चित् -- चेतना
• आनन्द -- आनन्द
• परब्रह्म -- सर्वोच्च सत्य (निर्गुण)

हज़ार नामों ने एक मंदिर बनाया -- 1000 ईंटें, 1000 दीवारें, 1000 स्तम्भ -- और उस मंदिर में श्रीवेंकटेशसहस्रनामपरिपूर्णसच्चिदानन्दपरब्रह्म विराजमान हैं। सत् (वे हैं), चित् (वे जानते हैं), आनन्द (वे आनन्दित हैं), और परब्रह्म (वे सर्वोच्च हैं)। इससे आगे कोई नाम नहीं -- क्योंकि इससे आगे कोई सत्य नहीं।

सहस्रनाम पूर्ण। मंगलम्।
modern_context_en:
Om Sri Venkatesha Sahasranama Paripurna Satchidananda Parabrahmane Namah -- the 1000th name -- the SUMMIT -- the Sahasranama is COMPLETE.

This is the grandest, longest, most inclusive name: eight words in one:

• Sri -- auspiciousness
• Venkatesha -- Lord of Tirumala (Saguna form)
• Sahasranama -- thousand names (this journey)
• Paripurna -- completely revealed
• Sat -- existence
• Chit -- consciousness
• Ananda -- bliss
• Parabrahma -- the supreme absolute (Nirguna truth)

A thousand names have built a temple: 1000 bricks, 1000 walls, 1000 pillars. Within that temple sits Sri Venkatesha Sahasranama Paripurna Satchidananda Parabrahma. He EXISTS (sat), he is CONSCIOUS (chit), he is BLISSFUL (ananda), and he is SUPREME (parabrahma). No name follows -- because no truth remains beyond this.

The Sahasranama is complete. Mangalam.
nri_context:
For every NRI who has walked this thousand-name journey across sessions, batches, time zones, and continents -- you have arrived at the summit.

Sri Venkatesha Sahasranama Paripurna Satchidananda Parabrahma -- the Lord who stood at Tirumala when you began and who stands within your heart as you finish -- is the same God. One thousand names. One God. One truth.

The Balaji you remember from childhood temples in India, the Balaji whose photo sits on your desk abroad, the Balaji whose name you whispered during lonely nights, the Balaji who gave you strength for visa interviews, who blessed your children, who held your parents when you could not -- THAT Balaji is Satchidananda Parabrahma. Existence. Consciousness. Bliss. The Absolute.

This Sahasranama is your offering. A thousand names, a thousand flowers, laid at the lotus feet of Sri Venkatesha.

1000 of 1000. Journey complete. Govinda Govinda. Mangalam.
usage_context:
Chant as the FINAL and SUPREME name of the Venkateswara Sahasranama. This is the culminating name -- the thousandth flower -- the temple's shikhara -- the mountain's summit. Chant with folded hands, closed eyes, and a heart that has journeyed through 999 names to arrive at this one. This name contains every name that preceded it. This name IS the Sahasranama in one breath.

Om Sri Venkatesha Sahasranama Paripurna Satchidananda Parabrahmane Namah.

Mangalam. Mangalam. Mangalam.
